text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I've been waiting for Bamboo Memory for a while,
but she hasn't shown up for training.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
TRAINER! I'M SO SORRY! I didn't mean to be
late!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
I got completely caught up watching this red-hot
show... But I'll make up for it! A hundred laps
should be appropriate! Plus a hundred-page
apology letter!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
As part of the disciplinary committee, I'm
supposed to be watching for latecomers! And
despite that, I... I...
choice_data_list: It's enough that you realize your mistake.
It's enough that you realize your mistake.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Ngh... You're so understanding! That makes me
even more embarrassed! You've left me with no
choice...

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: I'll do a thousand laps around the track! And write a thousand-page apology letter!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Bamboo Memory seems truly remorseful, so I tell
her not to beat herself up too much.
